description: After a home inspection reveals issues, the buyer's agent must negotiate repairs or credits with the seller's agent.

nodes.task_description: Receive the inspection report and review it with the buyer to identify key issues.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the most critical repair items for negotiation.

nodes.task_description: Draft a repair request addendum listing the requested repairs or a credit in lieu of repairs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a formal addendum to the purchase agreement.

nodes.task_description: Negotiate the terms of the repair addendum with the listing agent until an agreement is reached.

expected_outcome.value: Both parties sign the addendum, resolving the inspection contingency.
